title: Afrorchis congoensis
taxonomy: Afrorchis congoensis belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is a type of terrestrial orchid. Afrorchis congoensis is native to the tropical regions of Central and West Africa. It is a species of orchid that has been identified and classified by botanists. The classification of Afrorchis congoensis is still being studied and updated by the scientific community.
